blind_spots_remaining: No automated verification that consumer repos read or act on directives
Behavioral test coverage for expanded persona set (Streeling departments, ga agents) unverified
Submodule currency since 2026-03-20 (last driver cycle) unverified — 3 days of potential drift
moral_sensitivity: 0 new signals / 5 resolved = resolution-dominant cycle. Conscience is processing backlog, not detecting new issues.
overall_assessment: maturing — the conscience system has demonstrated a complete detect → act → verify → resolve cycle over 6 days. All signals from the inaugural cycle have been processed. The one regret has been resolved with structural prevention (submodule-notify workflow). The system moves from nascent to maturing phase.
self_reflection: Six days ago, Demerzel's first conscience cycle revealed uncomfortable truths about the gap between governance claims and reality. Today, that gap has closed significantly. All 3 consumer repos have governance scaffolding on main. The stale-directive lesson has been operationalized as a workflow. The silence about consumer repos has been partially filled with beliefs and reconnaissance. What remains is the hardest problem: verifying that governance artifacts are not just present but used. Presence is not compliance. The next growth edge is directive compliance verification — knowing not just that repos have governance files, but that their agents actually follow them.
growth_markers: First complete signal → resolution cycle completed
